ddls:
CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., low-pass, high-pass, band-pass) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "design_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the filter was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the filter was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the filter (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the filter type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the filter type was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the filter type (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., passband, stopband, attenuation) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter (e.g., F, A) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., kHz, dB) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the parameter (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the unit (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasheets" (
  "datasheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datasheet */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter the datasheet belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the datasheet */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the datasheet in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the datasheet was uploaded */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the datasheet */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the datasheet */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the datasheet belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the datasheet (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datasheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasheets_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the filter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser) used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the permission (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
